zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ferrers於1394年出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，她的父親Sir Robert Ferrers49歲，母親Joan de Beaufort19歲。她和Ralph Neville至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1457年1月25日在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ferrers于1394年出生在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃时，她的父亲Sir Robert Ferrers49岁，母亲Joan de Beaufort19岁。她和Ralph Neville至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1457年1月25日在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年63岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ferrers was born in 1394, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Ferrers, was 49 and her mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Ralph Neville. She died on 25 January 1457, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ferrers est née en 1394, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Ferrers, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Ralph Neville. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1457, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Ferrers 1394 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Ferrers 49 und ihre Mutter Joan de Beaufort 19. Sie hatte mit Ralph Neville mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1457 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ferrers è nata il nel 1394 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Ferrers, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Joan de Beaufort, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Ralph Neville. Morì il 25 gennaio 1457, nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ferrersが1394年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Ferrersは49歳，母Joan de Beaufortは19歳であった。彼女はRalph Nevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1457年1月25日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ferrers(이)가 1394년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Ferrers(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Neville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 1월 25일 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

mn.Howden, Yorkshire, England: Howden, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ferrers nasceu em 1394, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Ferrers, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Ralph Neville. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1457, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ferrers родилась в 1394 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Ferrers было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Ralph Neville. Она умерла 25 января 1457 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Ferrers nació en 1394, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Ferrers, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Joan de Beaufort, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Ralph Neville. Murió el 25 de enero de 1457, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
